name: Eggs Baked in Sour Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow casserole dish, combine half the breadcrumbs, 1 1/2 cups sour cream, and half the butter.
2. Arrange the raw eggs on top of the mixture.
3. Sprinkle the remaining breadcrumbs and grated Parmesan cheese over the eggs.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 20 minutes, or until the eggs are set.
